_comment: Immortal Court Central Palace (仙庭中宫) — the seat of the Immortal Sovereigns on the Immortal Astral Continent. Canon: the ruling body of the IAC resides in a magnificent palace complex at the center of the continent. The palace is vast, with jade pillars, spirit beast guardians, and formation-protected halls. This is where the Nine Suns (Grand Empyreans) hold court. Wang Lin arrives here in the final arcs. Stand-in: village town_center + structures for palace feel. Biome: immortal_court.
